Question

Write a Java program to store the following details using appropriate data types and display them:

Student ID = 101
Grade = A
Passed = true
Age = 18

Print all values on the console.


package day1;

public class Program_Datatype {

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		int Student_ID = 101;
			char Grade = 'A';
				boolean Passed = true;
				int Age = 18;
				System.out.println("Student ID : "+Student_ID+"\nGrade : "+Grade+"\nPassed : "+Passed+"\nAge : "+Age);

	}

}
